title: DUX v9.5 Problem Object
description: Strategic job-to-be-done defining market-level opportunities - focuses on user motivations and desired outcomes

object_type.description: Object type discriminator - always 'Problem' for Problem objects

description.description: Job-to-be-done statement following the pattern: 'When [situation], I want [motivation], so I can [outcome].'

end_user.description: User personas or roles who experience this problem

what_is_at_stake.description: What users lose or risk if this problem isn't solved

result_ids.description: Results that address this problem with evidence status tracking

evidence_status.description: System-derived evidence quality: evidence_backed (2+ evidence, 1+ quantitative), evidence_present (1+ evidence, may lack quantitative), assumptive (recommend phase or no supporting evidence)

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this problem's existence and importance

evidence_teaser.description: Brief insight hook for pain points, stats, or key findings

tags.description: System-derived tags generated by NotebookLM DUX scan - not manually set
